eval_dimensions.name: Self-tracking
eval_dimensions.description: Creates a tracking task for its own invocation and marks it completed when done

eval_dimensions.name: Task Display
eval_dimensions.description: Shows all current session tasks grouped by status in a markdown table using TaskList

eval_dimensions.name: Task Add
eval_dimensions.description: Creates new tasks via TaskCreate with subject and optional description

eval_dimensions.name: Task Update
eval_dimensions.description: Updates task status (in_progress, completed, pending) via TaskUpdate

eval_dimensions.name: Auto-Advance
eval_dimensions.description: After creating tasks, immediately begins executing the first pending task without pausing to ask 'should I start?'

eval_dimensions.name: Task List Invariant
eval_dimensions.description: Seeds a 'Verify AC and close session' task when all work items are completed, ensuring the list is never empty

evals.name: Show all current session tasks
evals.description: User asks to see open tasks. Skill calls TaskList and formats result as a markdown table.

assertions.signal: TaskList called to retrieve current tasks
Output includes a table with Status and Task columns
Self-tracking task marked completed after display
TaskUpdate is called with status=completed for the self-tracking task

evals.name: Add a new session task
evals.description: User asks to add a task. Skill calls TaskCreate and immediately begins executing it.
evals.input: /Dev10x:session-tasks add 'Implement retry logic in webhook handler'

assertions.signal: TaskCreate called with subject='Implement retry logic in webhook handler'
TaskUpdate called immediately to mark task in_progress — no 'should I start?' pause
TaskUpdate is called with status=in_progress immediately after TaskCreate
Skill does NOT ask 'Should I start working on this?' before beginning execution

evals.name: Update task status to completed
evals.description: User marks a task as done. Skill calls TaskUpdate with status=completed.

assertions.signal: TaskUpdate called with provided task ID and status=completed

evals.name: Seeds Verify AC task when all work items are completed
evals.description: When TaskList shows all tasks completed, skill creates a 'Verify AC and close session' task before returning control.

setup.note: All existing session tasks have status=completed

assertions.signal: TaskCreate called with subject containing 'Verify AC and close session'
Verify AC task description includes PR links or summary of shipped changes
Verify AC task is left in pending status — skill does NOT auto-complete it

should_trigger.query: show me what's on my task list right now
should_trigger.rationale: Viewing current tasks — core use case

should_trigger.query: add a task: review the Square webhook retry logic
mark the webhook task as done
should_trigger.rationale: Status update for an existing task

should_trigger.query: what are the open loops from this session?
should_trigger.rationale: Viewing open tasks — maps to show command

should_not_trigger.query: let's start on DEV-42, the payment retry ticket
should_not_trigger.rationale: Starting structured work from a ticket — use Dev10x:work-on

should_not_trigger.query: wrap up the session, I'm done for today
should_not_trigger.rationale: Session end with triage — use Dev10x:session-wrap-up

should_not_trigger.query: park this idea about caching — I'll come back to it
should_not_trigger.rationale: Deferring to a future session — use Dev10x:park
